mapper.sql: id, user_id, action_name, weight_kg, reps, sets, rpe, record_date, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_record (user_id, action_name, weight_kg, reps, sets, rpe, record_date, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{actionName}, #{weightKg}, #{reps}, #{sets}, #{rpe}, #{recordDate}, #{deleted})
mapper.delete: UPDATE training_record SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM training_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM training_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT FROM training_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{date} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT record_date) FROM training_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
